purpose: Single product on clean background with directional lighting. Daily backbone chain across all sectors.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

background_treatment.description: Background color or tone direction (resolved from brand fingerprint if not provided)

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Professional commercial product photography of {product_descriptor}, hero shot on {background_color} seamless background, {quality_tier} editorial lighting from upper left at 45 degrees, soft fill light from right, sharp focus, shallow depth of field, centered composition with negative space, shot on 100mm macro at f/8, ultra-high resolution, hyper-realistic textures, no text, no people, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch, grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: U01. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi premium tier prefer warm gold or sand-tone backgrounds over pure white. Avoid blue for traditional brands. Reference image: Recommended. Recommended frequency: 3-5 per week.
